name: cache layer: bumping rule.meta.version invalidates cached entries for that rule
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --rule-version 1 --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --rule-version 2 --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"cache_status":"miss"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
